title: 12-foot "King of the World" statue shows Trump embracing Epstein near the Capitol
author: Jason Weisberger
summary:
The artists at Secret Handshake are at it again. This time a 12-foot statue depicting Donald Trump embracing Jeffrey Epstein in the famous Titanic "king of the world" pose appeared overnight across from the U.S. Capitol.

The installation, titled "KING OF THE WORLD," includes plaques comparing the fictional romance of Titanic to what the artists describe as the real-life friendship between Trump and Epstein, along
